prompt: Serialization of this class creates a security vulnerability. What is the bug?
choices: Serializable classes cannot hold String fields
Storing password as a serialized field saves it in plaintext to disk or network; passwords should be transient or stored as a hash
The Credentials class should implement Externalizable instead
serialVersionUID is required for classes holding sensitive data
explanation: Serializing a password as a String writes it in plaintext to the byte stream (file, network, memory). This is a security risk — anyone who can read the serialized form gets the password. Fix: mark password as transient (it won't be serialized), or store a hashed value instead of the raw password.
